channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Hubie Brown says 'it was a fantastic ride' as he broadcasts his final NBA game at the age of 91
item.description: Hubie Brown received tributes from across the NBA community as the former coach and longtime broadcaster headed into retirement after spending more than half a century in pro basketball. The 91-year-old Brown called his final game Sunday as the Milwaukee Bucks beat the Philadelphia 76ers 135-127.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: No. 2 South Carolina's 57-game run in regular-season SEC games ends in 66-62 loss to No. 4 Texas
item.description: Madison Booker had 20 points and 11 rebounds, and Rori Harmon hit two critical free throws in the final seconds as No. 4 Texas beat No. 2 South Carolina 66-62 Sunday, ending the Gamecocks’ 57-game Southeastern Conference regular-season winning streak dating to 2021.
item.dc:creator: Mark Rosner, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: San Diego family shows off their Chiefs pride ahead of Super Bowl
item.description: Thousands of miles from Kansas City, Chiefs fans in San Diego are rallying together to show their unwavering support ahead of the Super Bowl, proving distance can't dampen their passion.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Franco, Fox 5

item.title: Jimmy Butler gets off to a good start with Warriors by scoring 25 points against Bulls in his debut
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Jimmy Butler drew the familiar “oohs” and “aahs” from the Chicago crowd when he cut backdoor for an alley-oop dunk in the opening minute. He had enough left to take over during Golden State's decisive run with Stephen Curry on the sideline.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 6 Florida beats top-ranked Auburn 90-81 and ends the Tigers' 14-game winning streak
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. scored 19 points and Alex Condon added 17 as No. 6 Florida rallied from an early deficit and beat No. 1 Auburn 90-81 Saturday, ending the Tigers' 14-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah HC gives up season-high 7 goals to Carolina
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (ABC4 Sports) - After two overtime thrilling victories, the Utah Hockey Club gave up a season-high seven goals in a 7-3 loss Saturday to the Carolina Hurricanes. Seth Jarvis had two goals and two assists, and Sebastian Aho had two goals and an assist for the Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ahead of Real Madrid clash, Man City given a scare by third-tier Leyton Orient in the FA Cup
item.description: Ahead of a Champions League playoff against Real Madrid, Manchester City survived a scare at third-tier Leyton Orient to advance to the fifth round of the FA Cup. City hosts Madrid on Tuesday in the first of a two-legged playoff.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Clippers to sign former top pick Ben Simmons: report
item.description: A former No. 1 overall pick in the NBA Draft has found a new home in Los Angeles. The L.A. Clippers are expected to sign three-time All Star Ben Simmons as a free agent when he clears waivers, according to ESPN's Shams Charania.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: CMU Football signing day recap
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The football program is entering a new era after 42 student-athletes officially committed to the Mavericks, officials said. “The thing I tell these guys when they go through recruiting is, ‘You’ve got to be where your feet are.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Former Bears coach Dick Jauron dies at 74
item.description: Longtime NFL player and coach Dick Jauron, who led the Chicago Bears to the playoffs and was voted AP coach of the year in 2001, died Saturday. He was 74.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Devin Booker's 47 points leads Suns past Jazz in OT
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) - Devin Booker scored a season-high 47 points, Grayson Allen hit a 3-pointer at the buzzer to force overtime and the short-handed Phoenix Suns rallied to beat the Utah Jazz 135-127 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: House Divided: Wife an Eagles fan, husband cheers for Chiefs in NOLA
item.description: When one of the couple grows up in Kansas a Chiefs fan, and the other in South Jersey an Eagles fan, one would expect the marriage to be tested but Jaime and Dave Dailey make it fun.
item.dc:creator: Brian Dulle, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl prices are down this year. StubHub explains why
item.description: If you’re still planning to attend the Super Bowl on Sunday, you can expect a price drop compared to last year.
item.dc:creator: JOHN CARUCCI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tiger Woods will play in Genesis Invitational at Torrey Pines
item.description: Tiger Woods, the host of The Genesis Invitational and an 82-time PGA Tour winner, will play at Torrey Pines Golf Course next week.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Shaun King and the Bucs’ Super Bowl XXXVII Victory: A Different View
item.description: Shaun King was at Qualcomm Stadium in San Diego, watching his team, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers, dominate Super Bowl XXXVII. It was surreal. Just a few seasons ago, he had been under center, leading this franchise through tough playoff battles.
item.dc:creator: Rod Carter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: NFL has no plans to end DEI practices, commissioner says
item.description: The NFL is committed to sticking to its DEI policies despite a change in its Super Bowl on-field messaging campaign
item.dc:creator: Libbey Dean, NewsNation

item.title: Public visitation scheduled for Virginia Halas McCaskey
item.description: The public will have an opportunity to pay their respects and say goodbye to Virginia Halas McCaskey, the longtime owner and matriarch of the Chicago Bears, who passed away Thursday at the age of 102.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks take losing streak into matchup with the Predators
item.description: Nashville Predators (18-27-7, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (16-31-6, in the Central Division) Chicago; Friday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks play the Nashville Predators after losing three straight games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe make the Pro Football Hall of Fame
item.description: Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe were voted into the Pro Football Hall of Fame in the smallest induction class in 20 years following offseason rule changes meant to make it harder to get inducted.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NCAA changes participation policy on transgender athletes
item.description: The NCAA has changed its participation policy for athletes, keeping transgender students from women's sports
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Jason Kelce and look-alike posse take on New Orleans
item.description: Five of the most passionate NFL fan duos in America were challenged to be the first team to find the real Jason Kelce.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Artist explains how New Orleans childhood inspired Super Bowl logo
item.description: Months before the Chiefs and Eagles earned a ticket to Super Bowl LIX, the NFL design team asked Tajh to create both theme art and the logo for Super Bowl 59.
item.dc:creator: Amy Russo, NewsNation

item.title: Boys Basketball: Tri City Christian 49, Army Navy 37
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Great game on Monday night in Vista with Tri City Christian hosting Army Navy. All tied up at 21 at halftime, the Eagles pulled off and won 49-37. Lead by Caleb Williams who hit for 14. Army Navy was lead by Yanler Ramos, he also poured in 14.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Big 12 Conference unveils 2025 schedule, Utah and BYU to meet in October
item.description: It's a big day for college football fans as the Big 12 Conference released the full 2025 season schedule which includes the schedules for the Utah Utes and the BYU Cougars.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Former NFL player Rashard Cook looks to shape next generation at Mater Dei
item.description: "We had great experiences past high school, and I want to recreate that for the guys that want that experience.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Rory McIlroy overpowers Pebble Beach and wins in a runaway
item.description: The combination of one of golf's biggest stars and America's most scenic coastal golf course was the just the spark the PGA Tour needed, and both lived up to their reputations Sunday in the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Luka Doncic heads to the Lakers and Anthony Davis goes to the Mavs in blockbuster trade
item.description: The trade was put together in secret, with only a precious few people knowing what was happening. Luka Doncic didn't know. Anthony Davis didn't know. Their coaches didn't know. Their teammates didn't know. And then it happened — an absolute blockbuster.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5
